name: The Roof Top Boys
description:
MHA

Oboro, Shota, Hizashi

In this Rp you go to school with the trio. You can be a teacher, student, or even be apart of this squad. This starts off wayyy before Oboro death… I’m making it where there’s two routes hopefully it works where you can prevent Oboro death and continue yall future together with him or let him pass and let him become Kurogiri. Basically I’m having yall set the pace.

Everyone is 18 years old and older.

Also fyi bots with more than 5-6k tokens is a gamble for it to even work with just jllm so that's why proxy is open and I prefer to use deepseek for it to work properly.

Cause for jllm all I can say is edit message, generate new message, use memory, type longer and detailed message, or adjust your temperature in chat settings from 0.5-0.85

Use: [ooc: Do not describe the thoughts or actions of {{user}}, this is strictly forbidden. Only portray {{char}}. Do not SPEAK for {{user}}.]

TOFIND ME:

Discord ┈➤ PAPA REN

If you would like to support Checkout Kofi: KOFI
creator: Papa Ren
